case_id: Fresh Catch menu item (test case, synthetic data)

pi_items.source: Task description (task.json line 5), verifier.py line 46, setup_task.sh comment ensuring item doesn't pre-exist
Task description (task.json line 5: 'manually enter the price as $42.50'), verifier.py line 63 (target_price = 42.50), verifier.py line 94 (checks price within 0.01 of 42.50)

Verifier.py lines 58-70: anti-gaming rule that base price (PRICE column in MENU_ITEM table) must NOT equal the test price to prevent agents from creating fixed-price items instead of variable-price items

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Floreant POS, a real open-source point-of-sale system. The test expects creation of a menu item named 'Fresh Catch' configured as a variable-price item (base price in database must not be $42.50), then processing a transaction for that item at a manually-entered price of $42.50. The verifier enforces an anti-gaming check: if the base price equals the test price, the agent attempted to bypass variable pricing.
